username.title: Username
username.description: Username to connect to Supabase. This user should have privileges to read all the metadata in Supabase.

hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Host and port of the Supabase service. Example: db.<project-ref>.supabase.co:5432

database.title: Database
database.description: Database of the data source. Defaults to 'postgres' for Supabase projects.

ingestAllDatabases.title: Ingest All Databases
ingestAllDatabases.description: Ingest data from all databases in Supabase. You can use databaseFilterPattern on top of this.

databaseSchema.title: Database Schema
databaseSchema.description: Database Schema of the data source. This is an optional parameter; if left blank, OpenMetadata Ingestion will scan all schemas. Note: Supabase projects contain system schemas (auth, storage, realtime, extensions) alongside your data.

sslConfig.title: SSL Configuration
sslConfig.description: SSL Configuration details. Supabase requires SSL for all connections.

schemaFilterPattern.title: Default Schema Filter Pattern
schemaFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude schemas that matches the pattern. Recommended to exclude Supabase system schemas: auth, storage, realtime, extensions, graphql, graphql_public, supabase_functions.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude tables that matches the pattern.

databaseFilterPattern.title: Default Database Filter Pattern
databaseFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude databases that matches the pattern.
